parameters: \n<Ino> \c[6] What are you doing here Naruto? What do you need?\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Hi Ino, as you probably already know... I was kicked out of my apartment for not paying the rent.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10]And I was wondering if you can hire me part-time\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Well, actually I do need someone to work for me.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] But hold on, it's not that easy, the job is kinda... complicated.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] How complicated can selling flowers be?
People come, you sell flowers, people leave.
\n<Ino> \c[6] Yeeeeaah well... the thing is you won't work here, in the store.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] What do you mean by that? Not gonna work here?
I dont get it, you said you were going to hire me.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Shut up and listen to me!... sheesh.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Look, I need you to bring me some special flowers.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Flowers that only grow in specific places.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] And since you're so strong, the job is perfect for you!\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Finding flowers? Thats easy peasy haha! Believe it!\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] So, where can I find those flowers for you? And how much will I be paid for each one?
\n<Ino> \c[6] Well, some flowers can be found during certain
ninja missions, just use your eyes and explore while
\n<Ino> \c[6] I'll pay you 5 Ryo for each flower,
\n<Naruto> \c[10] JUST 5 RYO FOR RISKING MY LIFE???
\n<Ino> \c[6] Yea... I cant afford to pay you more.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] (Actually i can pay much more but...
to be honest I can take adventage of this clown hehehe).\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Listen, you got kicked out of your apartment and you also need money, i'm right?.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (God dammit, she's right... I don't have much of a choice here, Tsunade will kick my ass if she hears I rejected this job.
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Okay, I'll do it, just tell me where can I find your stupid flowers.\
Okay, so the first flower is called "Gardenia", it can be found
\n<Ino> \c[6] To get there, you can accept the D-rank ninja mission, it will lead you to the flower's habitat.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Once you get the flower, bring it to me in one piece and i'll pay you.
Remember, be gentle! If the flower is damaged, I can't accept it.
$gameSystem.showQuestPopup("New quest(s) unlocked!\nCheck the Ninja Path journal.", 300);
\n<Ino> \c[6] So Naruto, you finished the job?\!\
\n<Ino> \c[6] I cant believe you really did it for 5$ HAHA!\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (She never really gets tired of being a bitch?)\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Okay I did my part, give me the payment.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] I hope we keep working together!\
\n<Ino> \c[6] (I payed him 5 Ryo but I can sell it for $100 ...what a clown haha).\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Well... I don't know.. this is kind of dangerous for such a low payment..
\n<Naruto> \c[10] (Maybe I will just quit this crap job)
\n<Ino> \c[6] Hey hey, hold on... why so sad?\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Dont be mad at me, I cant really pay you much more.\
\n<Ino> \c[6] I'm not selling much lately, besides that
\n<Naruto> \c[10] U-Uh Ino... What are you doi-\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Listen, keep bring me those flowers and...
I'm going to raise your "payment"... trust me.\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] Huh... how many more do you need?\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Bring me two (2) more and you'll get a...
\n<Ino> \c[6] You dont have any yet, idiot, you joking at me?\
\n<Ino> \c[6] Get your ass out of here and go get me

Hurry up!, go out and bring me 2 more gardenia flowers!

\n<Ino> \c[6] So what are you waiting for?!
Hurry up!, go out and bring me 1 more gardenia flower!

be properly for your good work and...\

Hurry up! Go out and bring me that flower!\

since she's not here, I think she'll understand.\

I found it the other day on the street.\

I was wondering if you can lend it t-\
\n<Naruto> \c[10] What?, no, I just neeed it one t-\

you just said you found it lying around...\

\n<Ino> \c[6] All I can give to you is this special reward... you're practically taking advantage of me right now!
